prompt: How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?

inputData.question: How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How many scholarships have been paid vs not yet paid?"},"startedAt":1771855702777,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The scholarships table has a paid_date column that is nullable. Scholarships with a non-null paid_date have been paid, while those with a null paid_date have not yet been paid. I'll count scholarships grouped by payment status.","sql":"
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END AS payment_status,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END
ORDER BY payment_status DESC

visualization.title: Scholarships: Paid vs Not Yet Paid

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END AS payment_status,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END
ORDER BY payment_status DESC

visualization.title: Scholarships: Paid vs Not Yet Paid

result.sql:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END AS payment_status,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM public.scholarships
GROUP BY CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Paid' ELSE 'Not Yet Paid' END
ORDER BY payment_status DESC
